title: FX Algorithmic trading at National Bank
description:
QUARCC is excited to host Alexandre Gagné-Larose, Director of FX Algorithmic Trading at National Bank of Canada, for an exclusive deep dive into the world of automated currency markets.

In an era where milliseconds matter, Alexandre will walk us through how National Bank leverages high-frequency data and sophisticated algorithms to navigate the global FX landscape. Join us to learn about the intersection of financial theory and software engineering in one of the world's largest asset classes.
